prompt: Our engineering team wants to build a production-grade prompt-engineering capability for our LLM-powered product features. Right now prompts live in code comments and engineers iterate by vibes. We need prompt versioning, systematic evaluation, A/B testing against live traffic, observability, and a feedback loop for continuous improvement. Map the components and tell us what to build in-house, buy as SaaS, or consume as a utility API.

assertions.text: Has a user-facing anchor at high visibility (>=0.9)
Visibility constraint respected for all edges (validator clean)
Prompt registry or versioning component exists
Cites at least one specific Wardley gameplay by name
Caveat present that evolution is scenario not forecast
